hero.demoSubtitle: A modern, accessible combobox that handles single-language countries as well as multi-language ones like Belgium, Switzerland, and Canada. Try it in the navbar above — or with the examples below.
hero.getStartedSubtitle: Install the @asafarim/country-language-selector package and drop the combobox into any React navbar.

locale.title: Locale-aware routing
locale.intro: Pick a country/language in the navbar — the URL updates to match.

footer.mobileHint: Resize to mobile width to see the bottom-sheet layout · Tab / ↑ ↓ / Enter / Esc all work.
